---
title: "Elizabeth Keble"
---

## Elizabeth Keble

**Dates:** (1789/90-7 Aug 1860)

### Description

sister of the Rev. John Keble

### Biography

[<i>Musings over the Christian Year</i>; wills index; 1851 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 26th 1895
- Letter from November 29. [1893?]
- Letter from Feb 26th 1874
- Letter from May 1866
- Letter from Febry 18th 1861
- Letter from 8th Aug. 1860.
- Letter from February 16, 1859
- Letter from Decr 7th 1857 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
